stemHtml:
What is the effect of icing or other airframe contaminants on the value of CLMAX, stall speed, and critical alpha?
The CLMAX…

options.a: increases, stall speed increases, and critical alpha decreases.
options.b: increases, stall speed decreases, and critical alpha increases.
options.c: decreases, stall speed increases, and critical alpha decreases.
options.d: remains unchanged, stall speed increases, and critical alpha decreases.
